Package lu.kbra.pclib.pointer.prim

Class PrimitivePointer<T>

java.lang.Object
lu.kbra.pclib.pointer.JavaPointer<T>
lu.kbra.pclib.pointer.prim.PrimitivePointer<T>
All Implemented Interfaces:
Consumer<T>, Supplier<T>
Direct Known Subclasses:
BooleanPointer, BytePointer, CharPointer, DoublePointer, IntPointer, LongPointer, ShortPointer
public abstract class PrimitivePointer<T> extends JavaPointer<T>
